Title: GAJ-AUTH-001 - Logged-out user is blocked from private resume analyzer
Steps:
1. Navigate directly to private resume analyzer route.
2. Observe response or redirect.
3. Check that private data is not shown.
Expected Result: Logged-out user is redirected or blocked safely.

Title: GAJ-AUTH-002 - Authenticated user can access private resume analyzer
Steps:
1. Navigate to private analyzer route.
2. Allow page/session to load.
3. Observe analyzer availability.
Expected Result: Authenticated user can access the private analyzer experience.

Title: GAJ-AUTH-003 - Protected API rejects unauthenticated request
Steps:
1. Call protected API endpoint without auth.
2. Review status and response body.
3. Check for data leakage.
Expected Result: API rejects request without exposing private data.

Title: GAJ-AUTH-004 - Stale session is handled safely
Steps:
1. Open private route with stale session.
2. Trigger protected action.
3. Observe refresh/logout behavior.
Expected Result: Stale session does not allow unauthorized access or corrupt state.
